Day advanced to 2026-03-19.
10,510 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
30 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 3 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-20): ['217580', '427993', '974962']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-18 -> 2026-03-19)

- "To which country will the survivor and the remains from the U.S. strike on an alleged drug-trafficking boat in the eastern Pacific be transferred, by March 31, 2026?" → Costa Rica
- "What specific part of Jerusalem will be reported as struck by an explosion seconds after missile sirens on March 20, 2026?" → Jerusalem's Old City
- "What bank will French authorities say was targeted in a foiled explosive attack at its Paris headquarters in March 2026?" → Bank of America
- "Which country will Sri Lanka publicly identify, by March 2026, as having asked to land two combat aircraft at Mattala airport?" → United States
- "Who will be reported as the IRGC spokesman whose funeral is held in Iran by March 2026?" → Ali Mohammad Naini
- "Which organization will be reported as rescuing a toddler from rubble after an airstrike by 29 March 2026?" → Iranian Red Crescent

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (300 resolved, 30 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
